title: Examples, Delimiters, Templates, and Structured Output · Failure Case: Example Selection
summary: Stabilize a classification and extraction prompt across varied inputs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt example selection increment in a tested prompt template with diverse examples. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose relevant and diverse examples that cover boundaries without teaching accidental shortcuts.
Refresh drift-prone facts and summarize stable discoveries before context compaction.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
